name: Walt Weiskopf
abstract: Walt Weiskopf (born July 30, 1959, in Augusta, Georgia) is an American jazz saxophonist, multi-instrumentalist, composer, author and educator. He has released sixteen albums as a leader, and performed on countless other albums as a sideman.

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...I was listening to one of your performances that’s on YouTube and Walt Weiskopf was playing... [INTERVIEWEE] I think he read the music verbatim...
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 22, 2021
